question: Tell us about your self?
choices: Beginner (Just starting to learn about entrepreneurship)
Steady (I have an idea and I'm ready to build Business)
Growth-Seeker (My veture is lauched and I'm foused on scaling)

question: What type(s) of Business are you most interested in?
What region or country will the Business operate in?
How do you plan to set up your Business?
choices: Solo (I want to start and run the Business on my own)
Co-founder (I want to start the Business with one or more partners)

question: How comfortable are you with uncertainty and risk in your career?
choices: I prefer stability and predictable outcomes
I'm comfortable with moderate risk if there's growth potential
I thrive in high-risk, high-reward situations
